prompt_replacements.old:
Use GROUP_KEY exactly for concrete members of a specified_question_inputs group key; source_value and temporal_bucket group keys have no GROUP_KEY inputs.
GROUP_KEY inputs are not candidate-row predicates; create no EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT for them.
prompt_replacements.new:
Use GROUP_KEY exactly for concrete members of a specified_question_inputs group key; source_value and temporal_bucket group keys have no GROUP_KEY inputs.
A specified_question_inputs group key restricts the result-key domain to its GROUP_KEY inputs and groups by them.
GROUP_KEY inputs are not candidate-row predicates; create no EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT for them.

prompt_replacements.old:
One population test may reference several POPULATION_TESTS use_ids, and several tests may reference the same use_id.
Each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT lists every POPULATION_TESTS use_id it consumes in question_input_use_refs.
prompt_replacements.new:
Build EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT tests only from prior POPULATION_TESTS uses; an input without use_id cannot be a question_input_use_ref.
One population test may reference several POPULATION_TESTS use_ids, and several tests may reference the same use_id.
Each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT lists every POPULATION_TESTS use_id it consumes in question_input_use_refs.
